title: getonia floribunda
intro: Getonia floribunda, also known as the 'Wild Jasmine', is a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka, commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Getonia floribunda include its ability to treat fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Getonia floribunda typically involve drying the flowers and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
